card_name_verified: Hilton Honors American Express Aspire® Card

recurring_credits.name: Hilton Resort Credit
recurring_credits.description: $200/half ($400/year) on eligible Hilton Resort purchases (room + incidentals).
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: Get up to $200 in statement credits semi-annually for eligible purchases made directly with participating Hilton Resorts, totaling up to $400 back annually

recurring_credits.name: Flight Credit
recurring_credits.description: $50/quarter ($200/year) on flight purchases via airline direct or Amex Travel.
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: Get up to $50 in statement credits each quarter, for a total of up to $200 back each year, on flight purchases

recurring_credits.name: CLEAR Plus Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $209/year statement credit for CLEAR Plus membership (auto-renewal required).
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: Up to $209 in statement credits per calendar year after you sign up and pay for a CLEAR+ Membership (subject to auto-renewal)
